observedFailuresAddressed: Phase 139 browser artifact generated twice and did not download deterministically.
Phase 139 command was falsely marked complete from a stale CLOSED_CLEANLY hotfix handoff.
Phase 139 normal overlay blocked because the work branch already existed from the hotfix attempt.
Manual routing copied ZIP from 13_chatgpt_downloads into 01_apply_approved, leaving the source capture copy behind.

requiredRuntimeRules.branchIdempotency: If the intended work branch already exists, switch to it when safe or require a unique rerun branch; do not fail solely because git switch -c reports branch exists.
requiredRuntimeRules.staleHandoffIsolation: A command may only be completed by a handoff that matches the current command id, phase id, expected ZIP, and run evidence.
requiredRuntimeRules.duplicateGenerationHandling: Duplicate artifact generation must create a blocked evidence packet and stop resubmission.
requiredRuntimeRules.downloadRoutingSemantics: 13_chatgpt_downloads is a capture/source folder. Copying to 01_apply_approved does not remove the source copy unless a move policy is explicitly selected.
